title: (Bullish Signal) MRTX, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Jan 28, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that MRTX's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 84 similar cases where MRTX's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 71 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $201.85 crossed the support line at $217.14 and is trading between $217.14 support and $167.27 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 12/24/20 - 01/28/21, the price experienced a -13% Downtrend. During the week of 01/21/21 - 01/28/21, the stock fell -4%.

https://preview.redd.it/z1cssjychbe61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=523f7d90ffe802f41cab28edad8689e566561cfc

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where MRTX's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 18 of 21 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 1 day, which means it's wise to expect a price bounce in the near future.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on January 28, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on MRTX as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 71 of 84 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

Following a +0.77% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MRTX advanced for three days, in 282 of 317 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8997755-mirati-therapeutics-mrtx-203-87-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-jan-28-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
